headline: Xcel Energy (XEL): Top 10 Safest Dividend Stock To Buy
summary: Xcel Energy Inc. (NASDAQ:XEL) is one of the 10 Safest Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. Morgan Stanley lowered the price target on Xcel Energy Inc. (NASDAQ:XEL) from $92 to $87 on May 21, 2026. The firm’s analyst kept an Equal Weight rating on the stock. According to the analyst notes, the firm updated its […]

headline: A Look At Xcel Energy (XEL) Valuation As Recent Share Momentum Cools
summary: What Xcel Energy’s Recent Share Performance Tells You Xcel Energy (XEL) has seen its stock up 0.3% over the past day, while declining over the past week, month, and past 3 months. This sets a mixed backdrop for assessing the utility’s fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Xcel Energy. Despite recent weakness, with the 30 day share price return down 3.73% and the 90 day share price return down 4.41%, Xcel Energy’s year to date share price return of 6.45% and 1 year total shareholder...
